mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_white_list (wl_type, wl_value, wl_reason, status, creator_id, creator_name) VALUES (#{wlType}, #{wlValue}, #{wlReason}, #{status}, #{creatorId}, #{creatorName})
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_white_list SET is_del = 1 WHERE id = #{id}

UPDATE sys_white_list SET is_del = 1 WHERE id IN
#{id}
